acoustic_preservation.claim_boundary: Amplitude-matched acoustic-region preservation diagnostic for the scalar OPH IR kernel. Raw amplitude is fitted out so this tests shape preservation rather than A_zeta normalization.

claim_boundary: CAMB TT transfer for the logical 24-round scale-compressed repair branch. The transfer uses the branch readouts n_s, q_IR, and ell_IR and compares the resulting TT curves with the local Planck TT binned table. It is measurement-comparable output, but it is not a physical OPH CMB prediction until the 24 repair rounds, scalar amplitude, OPH anomaly sector, and official likelihood/map-space gates are derived from finite support-visible dynamics.
